prompt:
Create a premium fashion advertisement for Adidas Originals.
Scene: A modern architectural outdoor setting with soft natural light and aesthetic shadows. Minimalist, high-end urban background with warm tones and clean composition.
Models: One confident male model and one elegant female model, both looking stylish.
Outfits: Tracksuits and joggers with visible logos and signature stripes.
Composition: Cinematic slightly low angle. Balanced framing with negative space for text.
Text Elements: “35% OFF” bold and clean typography, brand logo, and tagline: “MOVE YOUR WORLD. WEAR YOUR CONFIDENCE.”.
Style: Luxury, editorial, ultra-realistic, commercial advertising style.
